title: High myopia (severe, ≥-6 diopters) global prevalence (percent)

source.name: Global prevalence of high myopia
source.publisher: World Health Organization / Holden et al. 2016

notes: Illustrative; high myopia (≥-6 diopters) carries elevated risk of retinal detachment, glaucoma, and blindness. Figures from Holden et al. 2016 Ophthalmology with WHO projections for 2030/2050.
